feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Web App deploy - Blank screen
entry.content:
Hi,

I deployed my web app on git hub, but the page is complete blank. The only thong it is working is the image asset, nothing else is visible.

Can you help me?

entry.title: Unable to Create SAP build Automation application on SAP BTP account
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Please i am going throught the learning journey for SAP Build on SAP BTP, following the instructions there i noticed that i couldn't subscribe to an SAP Build Process Automation application. I always get an error when i try to do so. They recommended that I ask for help here in the community. Please I would appreciate every help I can get. Thanks in advance. See error screen shot below.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Basic Table with Adapter and Pagination
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm able to establish an OData integration in SAP Build Apps. I pull in the basic table with adapter and two buttons (Previous and Next) to navigate the pages.

However, the data remains static in the table after the Page Mounted event.

What I'm saying is - the basic table gets populated with data with the Page Mounted event. Every other Event does not refresh the data on the table. 

At first, i thought it was the variables. But I've tried App variables and Page Variables.

Both do not work with the pagination in the basic table with adapter.

The expectation is that with the component tap (button tap), the current page increments or decrements by 1.

The formula works. I've tested it on the Page Mounted event.

I'm even able to get it to display on the page. 

I'm able to get the total number of pages and total number of records.

But the basic table with adapter only gets populated with the Page Mounted event and no other events will get it to refresh.

I've tried modifying the properties of the table but it doesn't have the refresh property. If you create the refresh manually, you can't find the Internal Component that was mentioned in the other blogs.

I've seen a few questions about the Basic Table being populated from other Database via odata but they're running into the same problem.

Yes, i can switch to lists but i really want this basic table with adapter to work with pagination.

Any other recommendations?

I can export and upload my app here if anyone wants to have a look.

entry.title: Build process automation subscription is not visible in service market place
entry.content: Hi All, today when I am trying to search for Sap build process automation subscription in market place it's not visible here. Please help me

entry.title: SBPA Automations not able to detect SAP Easy Access Screen
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created an automation and in the first step , i have given a condition to determine whether the SAP Easy Access screen exists or not , if exists , the bot should run with that particular instance but in my case the bot is not able to recognize the Easy access screen and continue to run the automation with a new login.
But when i have already the same user open i.e. the credentials i used in the automation, the screen is getting identified.Please help me with this.

Thanks & Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: Sap AppBuilder IoS compilation error
entry.content:
Hi, starting from the previous week, the IOS building fails with this error:

 

Runtime version: 4.9.148; AB version: 2.0.0-alpha.1 COMMAND: npxrnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\"" FAILED with ERROR: Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\""

Everything seems to be configured in the right way. please help us!

Please give support to the Appbuilder community!!

entry.title: SAP Build App Bug
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm testing my application in web browser and it is working fine, able to post the data in database.

But same application if I test in SAP Build Preview App then in that case I'm getting oAuth 2 authorization issue.

I'm calling google firestore database API.

Also after login in web browser I can see all the content getting loaded successfully. But after logging in Mobile Device I'm getting logged in but not data getting displayed.

Refer below screen shot.

REST API

Data Variable Using : Bearer Token

This app works in web browser but not in SAP Build Preview App.

Information is given in this page about signing in with oAuth 2 in firebase doc.

But does anyone have idea how to get [Google_Id_Token] then please drop your answer.

curl 'https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signInWithIdp?key=[API_KEY]' \
-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-binary '{"postBody":"id_token=[GOOGLE_ID_TOKEN]&providerId=[google.com]","requestUri":"[http://localhost]","returnIdpCredential":true,"returnSecureToken":true}'

Any idea then please let us know.

Regards,

Ganesh N.

entry.title: App Builder IOS compilation error for imported app
entry.content:
Hi, i'm currently experiencing this issue while compiling my app in Appgyver App Builder Community Edition, here is the error stack, please give some advices and let me build the app:

 

Runtime version: 4.9.148; AB version: 2.0.0-alpha.1COMMAND:
npxrnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\""
FAILED with ERROR:
Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\""

entry.title: Consume OData service from On Premise in SAP Build
entry.content:
Hi,

Greetings!

 

Customer has his BTP accounts setup model as a common CF sub account for multiple business units with no Integration Suite but serverless runtime extension center for now.

Customer would like to start using SAP Build Portfolio (Build Apps, Build Process Automation and Build Work zone Standard Edition) with the above setup and has the following queries - 

1) Backend SAP systems are SAP ECC6 EHP6 on-premise and S4 Hana on-premise in AWS and currently using BTP Serverless Runtime Extension Center for OData Provisioning - can the OData services from these on-premise systems be accessible in SAP Build Apps, Build Process Automation and Build Workzone via extension center? or is exposing services via CAP or RAP the only alternative solution available?

2) With this single sub account setup how can it be ensured that from a security perspective only authorized user of a particular business unit can access an application apart from authorization setup in launchpad and as well as how can other business unit developers be not allowed to access other application code base.

Regards,

Vipin.

SAP Build SAP Build Apps SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Re: Error while adding subscription for SAP Build Apps se...
entry.content:
Hi Pooja,

Incase you are using the Free Trial account, the Sap build apps service is only available in region AWS US East (VA).

Please follow these steps steps shown in this video https://youtu.be/ZpQM2B1v2GY  

these steps are clear and I have followed them and It's working.

 

Regards,

Abdul Malik

entry.title: Deployed Business Process Automation not showing in Monitoring Processes and Workflows
entry.content:
I created a new Process Automation project from scratch with only an Automation in it.  I released and deployed it to my Public environment but when I go into Build -> Monitoring -> Manage -> Processes and Workflows, it's not there.  I tested it in Editable mode and it works just fine.

I'm sure this is something silly I've done but I can't figure out what it is.

Thanks in advance for any and all help.  🙂

Ron

entry.title: Using an OData API get records back to back in a single page by clicking a button in SAP Build Apps.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using an OData API which is carrying around 1000 of records, we are calling first 20 records through pagination in data variable, is there any way to call the rest of the data in a form of 20 records in a repetitive manner on the same page by configuring a button in SAP Build Apps.

Thanks in advance,
Yashmin

@Dan_Wroblewski , @marihirvi , @StephanKoenig , @Ian_Thain , @SandipAgarwalla

entry.title: Error: Missing text secrets Build iOS
entry.content:
Hello everybody!
I've had a problem for days that I haven't been able to resolve.

In the iOS version, I am unable to generate the .ipa file. It just keeps saying: Missing text secrets.
However, I have already done, redone and recreated all the required certificates, that is, the .p12 and the .mobileprovision, but it always gives the same error mentioned above (See attached image).
The password is correct, as I have already tested and tested it several times, I have even changed it to other passwords, including a very easy one (123456) just to test it, but the error continues.
I've already cleared the browser cache, opened it in other browsers and even tested it on another computer, but the error persists.
I don't know what it could be anymore, as until recently everything was working correctly.
In 3 weeks I will have to present the App to future investors and I need to generate the .ipa and send it to the Apple Store so they can test it, but without being able to generate it, it will be a problem for me.

Thank you for your attention!

entry.title: Build apps backend session not released
entry.content:
Hi

We have conenected Build apps to S4 backend vua BTP, SCC and Gateway OData service

When App is openened in "Preview" mode, it creates 7 dialogue sessions in the backened

Also when the App/browser is closed, backend session is not released in S4

Anyone faced this issue

Regards

MB

entry.title: SAP Build Apps: App doesnt get user information
entry.content:
Hi,

i have a problem with the system variable "systemVars.currentUser.email" (also the other ones like firstname or lastname) which reads the mail from the currently logged in user.
Its working on the preview app for one time, but after reloading the page, the variable is empty.

When I deploy the app and use it, it's empty everytime. 

In the developer tools from Chrome I can see, that this user API is triggered: /user-api/currentUser/
The query works and it returns my name, mail and some other information, but the systemvar variable is still empty.

Can somebody help me here?

Thanks,
Vincent

entry.title: How to create authentication(Sign up and login page) page in sap build apps ?
entry.content: I am creating an app using sap build apps. How can i create register and login page? In appgyver we have firebase. But for build apps is there any way?

entry.title: SAP BPA - Error in executing the action in Process flow
entry.content:
HI SAP BPA Community,

I am getting the below error while trying to execute the action in the process flow in BPA. I am connecting to S/4 HANA on-premise system and when I am executing the action from Action editor using the same Destination, it is working fine. I was not getting this error 1-2 months back when I was using the same destination.

I have already seen the below post but did not the solution.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-build-process-automation-problem-with-post-action-and-csrf-token/qaq-p/12723297 

The action is calling a custom OData from backend S/4 on premise system. Connection test is working from cloud connector, BTP cockpit and Action editor. But not working in Process flow.

"Perform ExchangeRate Entry" failed
Error message: Action 'b1790140-ffdf-4e89-966d-d98d5afa1f3a' failed with the following error: 'Error thrown from action runtime library: Failed to read sap.lcnc.fetchXcsrf flag from destination configuration : Could not fetch client credentials token for service of type "destination".'.
Log ID: 2b9789ea-338e-4104-a000-e974c88-us10

@Archana SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Open excel instance activity of SAP Build Process Automation is inactive.
entry.content:
I am using a Mac with desktop agent version 3.25.43. While creating projects in my system, I am not able to use the excel related activities. I have the Excel SDK added in dependencies as well. My excel version is 16.83. Is there something else I need to add, or is this problem related to the Excel version causing the activities to not work?

Regards,

Remya

entry.title: SAP Build App After Deployed into BTP getting Error while Open App Error GET --500 Missing zone info
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have SAP Build App trial version and create application and deploy into SAP BTP and successfully deployed into SAP BTP and display as HTML5 Application.

While Click on that App system is open into New browser but getting error as below

GET request to /buildappsXXXXX.buildappsXXXXX-1.2.1/index.html completed with status 500 Missing zone information

 

Kindly help me what is missing in SAP BTP, or SAP Build App. I can able to preview the application in SAP Build App but not after the Deployment into SAP BTP.

Thanks in Advance.
Regards,
Mithun

entry.title: In Build Code, Joule throws error message exceeded the AI usage
entry.content:
Hello All,

While trying to generate Entity and Services using Joule, I have keyed the below text:

"Create Entity :MyCars" and services "MyCars" based on the below fields with type string: ConditionType, PostalCode,E ntitlementGroup, ConditionRecord, VAKEY_LONG, S4TableName, S4TablePrefix, CustomerID, ProductClass, SalesOrg, Division, Channel, Plant, ShippingPoint, DestinationZone, SatelliteLocation, Incoterms, Incoterms2, Amount, Unit, UoM, ValidFrom, ValidTo, ValidFromDate, ValidToDate, WillCallRate, DateTimeReceived, IsValidRecord, ScaleQuantity, Per, ScaleLineNumber, ScaleAmount, ScaleIndicator, PriceSegment"

I receive the error message: Cannot generate the requested code as you have exceeded the AI usage.

What is the span of this usage and how many times it can be used? 

Thanks

Srihari
